endpoints.name: Describes the documents and directories available within a specific 'aspect' (content group) of the BCLaws library
endpoints.description: Describes the documents and directories available within a specific 'aspect' (content group) of the BCLaws library
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ASPECTID}} with a real aspectid.

endpoints.name: Lists the metadata available for the specified index or directory from the BCLaws legislative respository
endpoints.description: Lists the metadata available for the specified index or directory from the BCLaws legislative respository
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ASPECTID}} with a real aspectid. Replace {{CIVIXDOCUMENTID}} with a real civixdocumentid.

endpoints.name: Retrieves a specific document from the BCLaws legislative repository (HTML format)
endpoints.description: The /document API allows you to retrieve actual documents from the BCLaws legislative repository. To retrieve a document from the repository you need the aspect identifier and two other specific pieces of information about the document: the index identifier and the document identifier. These unique identifiers can be retrieved from the /content API.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ASPECTID}} with a real aspectid. Replace {{CIVIXINDEXID}} with a real civixindexid. Replace {{CIVIXDOCUMENTID}} with a real civixdocumentid.

endpoints.name: Retrieves a specific document from the BCLaws legislative repository with search text highlighted (HTML format)
endpoints.description: The /document API allows you to retrieve actual documents from the BCLaws legislative repository. To retrieve a document from the repository you need the aspect identifier and two other specific pieces of information about the document: the index identifier and the document identifier. These unique identifiers can be retrieved from the /content API.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ASPECTID}} with a real aspectid. Replace {{SEARCHSTRING}} with a real searchstring. Replace {{CIVIXINDEXID}} with a real civixindexid. Replace {{CIVIXDOCUMENTID}} with a real civixdocumentid.

endpoints.name: A listing of metadata available for the specified aspect and search term from the BCLaws legislative repository
endpoints.description: A listing of metadata available for the specified aspect and search term from the BCLaws legislative repository
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ASPECTID}} with a real aspectid.
